The '''Battle of Brentaal IV''' was the last battle of [[Skere Kaan|Kaan's]] campaign to capture the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]] for the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]]. It was an easy [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] victory. It occurred just after the [[Third Battle of Ruusan]], although Kaan was unaware of the battle there until after [[Kopecz]] arrived at Brentaal to inform him.<ref name="Path of Destruction" />

{{Battle-stub}}
